prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model, which assumes log-returns are normally distributed. Historical daily price data for MRK over the past year (approx. 252 trading days) was used to estimate the daily drift (average log-return) and volatility (standard deviation of log-returns). These parameters were then projected 6 trading days forward using the GBM formula to calculate the point estimate (median of the log-normal distribution) and the confidence intervals based on corresponding Z-scores.
